summary: Iteration 30: Tested OG image optimization and mobile image loading. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend: /sauny and /balie pages load correctly on mobile viewport (375x812). OG tags in index.html contain ?w=1200&q=80 params. Components (Models.jsx, Hero.jsx, BalieHero.jsx) correctly import and use optimizedImg() function.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html line 24: twitter:image contains same optimized URL - CORRECT
Models.jsx: imports optimizedImg from utils.js, uses it 9+ times for preloading, category cards, model cards, compare modal, detail modal, thumbnails, variant images
Hero.jsx line 76: uses optimizedImg(rawBg, { w: 1200, q: 80 }) for background image - CORRECT
BalieHero.jsx line 54: uses optimizedImg(resolveMediaUrl(content.background_image), { w: 1200, q: 80 }) - CORRECT
utils.js optimizedImg function (lines 17-24): correctly only transforms /api/images/ URLs, external URLs pass through unchanged
context_for_next_testing_agent: OG image optimization is complete. index.html meta tags have ?w=1200&q=80 params. All key components (Models.jsx, Hero.jsx, BalieHero.jsx) use optimizedImg() for image URLs. The optimizedImg function only transforms /api/images/ URLs - external URLs (unsplash, wm-kalkulator.pl) pass through unchanged. Preview DB is empty so /api/images/{id} returns 404, but OG tags point to production domain wm-spa.pl which has the images.
